Reshape the group and drive growth

Privatizing Hang Seng Bank - On January 26, 2026, after approval by shareholders and the court, We completed the privatization of Hang Seng Bank. Hang Seng Bank is currently A wholly-owned subsidiary of the HSBC Group, its shares are already in Hong Kong The Stock Exchange revokes its listing status. This transaction reflection set The group is confident in Hong Kong's prospects and further consolidates the Group's market leadership position. - By privatizing Hang Seng Bank, we expect two Hong Kong products Brand could achieve more than $500 million before tax by the end of 2028 Revenue and cost synergies, related restructuring costs to US$600 million. These costs are reported as significant and require attention project. We plan to focus on savings from cost synergies The new allocation to HSBC provides a range of competitive advantages and value-added returns. domain. - Our ambition also includes having two Hong Kong brand further generates approximately US$400 million in revenue and costs opportunity.

Simplify organizational structure - In the 2024 full-year results, we announced the simplification of the group structure agency measures, committing to reduce the cost base by approximately US$1.5 billion. Annualize costs and plan to simplify organizational structure to predict It is planned to achieve the goal by the end of 2026.

Founded in 1865, HSBC is one of the world's largest banking and financial services institutions.
We use our unique expertise, capabilities, understanding and vision to help our clients explore global opportunities.

Group strategy The Group's strategy supports our ambition to become the world's most trustworthy bank by always putting customers first and service first. We have a huge International network, stable and strong asset and liability strength, and through the provision of group products and services, we are committed to meeting the financial needs of customers and supporting them to achieve their goals Goal, galloping in the complex and ever-changing global market.

Our goal is to make decisions quickly and stably Appropriate, keep up with trends, adapt to changes, promote Simplify the structure and use technology and digitalization technology to prepare for the future.

We are highly customer-oriented and help our customers win Achieve outstanding results and strive to increase customer loyalty degree, and is involved in various businesses of the group in many areas, providing services to customers in the long run service.
As a premier international bank, we Committed to promoting long-term sustainable growth, paying equal attention to Identify areas of competitive advantage.
From January 1, 2025, the HSBC Group's operations will consist of four new businesses to simplify the organizational structure and accelerate the implementation of priority strategies.
1 Calculated based on revenue by business segment, excluding Corporate Centers.

The Hong Kong business has a market leading position, including the Hong Kong HSBC and Hang Seng Bank's retail banking and wealth management industries services, as well as industrial and commercial financial services.

The UK business has market leadership positions, including Zero Sales of banking and wealth management businesses (including first direct and M&S Bank), as well as UK industrial and commercial finance business (including including HSBC Innovation Bank).
International Wealth Management and Financial Excellence

Corporate and institutional financial management business is a cross-border transaction bank and capital Market leaders in the two fields of marketing business, among which the United Kingdom industrial and commercial financial services outside China and Hong Kong, as well as global banking banking and capital markets business.

International wealth management and financial excellence businesses include Hong Kong and Excellence in wealth management and private banking outside the UK services, investment management business and insurance business.
- For details of the Group's four major businesses and corporate centres, please see pages 16 to 24.

HSBC's values guide all the Group's actions, from strategic decisions to daily interactions with customers and colleagues. Our values are rooted in HSBC's history, heritage and corporate culture The foundation helps us implement the group's purpose.
Letter from the Group Chairman to shareholders
I am deeply honored to officially assume the role of Chairman of HSBC Group. able Serve this remarkable organization and work with talented people It is indeed my honor.

Looking back on HSBC's 161-year history, the group's founder's goal is to Hong Kong and Shanghai establish a bank to promote local and international trade Yes, this is the solid foundation for the development of the group.

We never forget this Enactus goal and uphold HSBC's mission Purpose and values, focus on doing the most important thing - serving customers households, move forward hand in hand with them, and explore opportunities in a complex environment. Encounter.

Carrying forward the past and looking into the future, the board of directors and I will continue to work with the capable and outstanding Group CEO Ai Qiaozhi and his management team work closely together, We are happy to see them strictly abide by discipline and accelerate the collective work with confidence. Team strategy.

HSBC today: streamlined and more flexible In terms of accelerating the Group's strategy, we will The launch of the new organizational structure was a key catalyst. The architecture is based on Hong Kong, UK, corporate and institutional financial management and international wealth management and the four major businesses of Excellence Financial Management as the focus.

We halved the number of operating businesses and radically simplified The newly established operating committee of the group has gradually transformed into a A modern financial institution with streamlined structure and more flexibility, which not only inherits The precious tradition also embraces technological progress and takes this as its core Strive to promote future growth, enhance competitiveness, and ultimately assist customers Realize ambitions.

Today, HSBC has clear core strengths and is renowned for its invest to continue to enhance competitive advantage while achieving sustainable Increase. We want to be the world's most trusted, customer-focused The bank's ambitions will surely come true.

sustainable development We continue to aim to become a net-zero emissions bank by 2050 Ambition. Supporting customers is at the core of HSBC's strategy, and for customers Providing financing to support their transition is not only important to customers large and in line with our net zero ambitions.

In November 2025, we publish our updated net zero transition plan plan, outlining our business-based sustainable development strategy, Reflecting the changing realities of global transition. We also make Updated emission targets and measurement indicators for medium-term financing projects and related policies to ensure that we continue to keep abreast of scientific development and at the same time and the Group's own net zero ambitions.

We believe that supporting our customers' transition is an important part of the Group's global transition to one of the most important roles in net-zero emissions. our The goal is to provide and facilitate RMB 750 billion to RMB 10,000 by the end of 2030 billion in sustainable development financing and investment. We will be in 2025 Providing and facilitating US$102 billion in sustainable development financing and investment, bringing the cumulative total from January 2020 to date to 4,956 billion, making good progress towards the 2030 goal.

Leadership and Board of Directors Changes This year is my first full year as chairman of the group. I would like to express my highest respect and gratitude to Sir William Du Jiaqi. Thank him for his outstanding leadership and outstanding contributions to HSBC.

Over the past eight years, Sir John Toro has helped lead HSBC to overcome various Unprecedented challenges, experiencing a global epidemic and unprecedented conditions in decades High inflation, as well as dramatic changes in the trade and geopolitical environment, have caused It has successfully enhanced the profitability and resilience of the Group and accelerated growth. Lay a solid foundation. I am fortunate to work with him through mutual trust and mutual trust. We have a deep friendship and thank him for his full support in making the handover smooth.

We also announced the appointment of Sun Wei as an independent non-executive director. Effective from January 1, 2026. Sun Wei has been in international affairs for more than 30 years During his professional career, he has accumulated rich banking and regulatory experience and has served as Co-CEO of Morgan Stanley Asia Pacific.

Gao Anxian will retire as a director at the 2026 annual general meeting affairs and withdraw from the board of directors. I would like to thank Gao Anxian for his support of HSBC The valuable contribution of the Board of Directors.

International Wealth Management and Premier Financial Services revenue reached 145 billion US dollars, an increase of 5%. In view of the management of customer deposits and their investment funds In view of the importance of wealth management, we are revising the disclosure of wealth management information. way of exposure. Meet new heights in wealth management

We have opened a brand new store on the 99th floor of the International Commerce Center in Hong Kong Wealth management center with luxurious environment and privacy, Serving the group's high net worth clients. The center is HSBC's fifth wealth management center in Hong Kong is also The group's largest wealth management center in the world. About 100 people Professionally trained wealth management experts are on site to provide interviews Face-to-face meetings and the use of digital tools to create wealth for clients Provide input into management decisions. The location of the new center It has strategic advantages, adjacent to the West Kowloon High Speed Rail Station and the Airport Express Two important data lines connecting mainland China and international customers points to help us meet the diverse financial needs of our customers, Especially customers in the Greater Bay Area.
